overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex. The character explores open courtyards with massive ram-headed sphinx statues, passes through decorated stone gateways, and enters a grand hypostyle hall with towering columns and hieroglyphic walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with ram-headed sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open temple courtyard, navigating around large statues and decorated pillars

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing near the ram statue observing the area
woman in long dress walking across the courtyard

entered.detail: large black stone statue of a ram-headed sphinx with a fire brazier burning at its base
tall stone pillar with colorful painted chevron decorations and hieroglyphic carvings
stone wall completely covered in ancient Egyptian hieroglyphic reliefs

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit open courtyard in an ancient Egyptian temple complex. Massive ram-headed sphinx statues dominate the space, surrounded by decorated stone pillars and walls covered in hieroglyphics. A few NPCs walk around the area, and the ground is paved with stone tiles and red carpets.

events.description: character passes through large stone gateway from open courtyard into garden corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive stone gateway and continuing along the garden path

notable_agents.action: woman in simple dress walking toward the camera through the gateway

entered.detail: massive stone archway with thick columns and detailed hieroglyphic carvings on the lintel
tall palm tree with green fronds visible against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open courtyard through a massive stone gateway into a garden passage. Palm trees and greenery become visible as the sky visibility changes to partial. The walls continue to display hieroglyphic carvings, and the character passes pedestrians moving in the opposite direction.

events.description: enters narrow enclosed corridor with walls completely covered in hieroglyphics
lighting becomes slightly dimmer and more diffused as moving deeper into the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor, navigating past other pedestrians and fire braziers

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress with jewelry walking toward camera
man in simple clothing walking in same direction ahead

entered.detail: tall stone walls on both sides completely covered in detailed hieroglyphic carvings and paintings
metal bowl with burning fire mounted on a tall stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed corridor where towering walls on both sides are entirely covered in hieroglyphic carvings. The space is more crowded with pedestrians walking in both directions. Fire braziers line the path, and the lighting becomes more diffused as the sky is mostly blocked by the high walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hypostyle hall with massive columns

events.description: exits narrow corridor into vast hypostyle hall with towering columns and scattered fire braziers

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall between massive columns, navigating through scattered groups of people and fire braziers

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking alongside the column
group of people gathered near the far exit of the hall

entered.detail: enormous cylindrical stone column with painted decorative bands and hieroglyphics near the top
white fabric banners hanging between the massive columns
polished stone floor covered with scattered flower petals and red carpets

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow corridor into a vast hypostyle hall filled with massive stone columns reaching toward the ceiling. The floor is scattered with flower petals and red carpets. White fabric banners hang between columns, and fire braziers provide warm lighting. Several NPCs walk through the space or gather in small groups.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian temple complex, transitioning from a bright open courtyard into a grand, enclosed hypostyle hall. It begins in a sunlit plaza dominated by massive ram-headed sphinxes and red carpets, moving past decorated stone pillars and wandering NPCs. As the character passes through a massive stone gateway, the scene shifts into a garden passage where palm trees and greenery appear under a partially obscured sky. The path then narrows into a crowded enclosed corridor lined with fire braziers and towering walls of hieroglyphics, causing the lighting to become more diffused. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor into a vast hall filled with towering stone columns, white fabric banners, and flower petals scattered across the floor.
